title: stelis medinae
intro: Stelis medinae, also known as the Ant Orchid, is a type of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for infections. The health benefits of Stelis medinae include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to promote wound healing and boost the immune system.
